title: Catalog Verification TODO
description: Tracks per-aspect verification status across the catalog. One entry per pattern in patterns[], one entry per composition (recipe or framework) in compositions[]. Aspect sets differ by composition kind, so the per-entry aspects map is validated against the kind via conditional rules below. Aspect values: 'todo' (not yet checked), 'pass' (verified correct), 'fail' (verified wrong, needs fix), 'na' (does not apply). Top-level 'verified' is true only when every applicable aspect is pass or na. Verification freshness contract: compare entry.last_verified against the matching pattern.last_updated (in patterns-src/) or composition.last_updated (in compositions-src/). If entry.last_verified >= source.last_updated the verification is still current and Phase 2 reverification can skip it; if source.last_updated > entry.last_verified the entry was edited after verification and needs re-checking. last_verified is null while the entry has never been verified.

aspect_definitions.description: Plain-English definitions of each aspect, grouped by entry kind (patterns, compositions-recipe, compositions-framework).

compositions.description: One entry per composition in compositions-src/. Each carries a 'kind' field ('recipe' or 'framework') matching the source entry; the aspect set required depends on kind.

consumer_requirements.description: Global verification items that are not per-entry — typically UI/consumer behaviour the catalog assumes (e.g., a confidence-level filter at http://localhost:8097/compositions/, or relative 'X days ago' rendering of last_updated). Tracked here so consumers of the catalog have a shared todo list.

aspects.description: Aspect-driven verification — automatic per-aspect statuses produced by the Phase 2 verifier (url_live, intent_present, members_have_evidence, status_in_practice_set, ...).

quality_review.description: Composition-by-composition quality run — a separate, narrative, human-driven deep pass on this single composition. Distinct from the aspect-driven sweep: aspects answer 'is each field present and well-formed?', quality_review answers 'is this entry overall coherent, accurate, and ready to ship?'. Both flows share the underlying composition + members[].evidence_status data. The quality run is considered up-to-date when last_run >= the source composition's last_updated; otherwise it is stale and needs a re-run.

summary.description: One-paragraph narrative summary of the deep-pass review — what was checked, what the reviewer concluded, what flags remain.
